texto: My heart didn’t break into a thousand pieces after he left. Instead, I realized all the things he didn’t do. He didn’t want to hear my stories. He didn’t ask me questions. He didn’t smile when I was talking to him. He didn’t hug me out of the blue to make me feel good. His hugs were always a preamble to something else and after he was gone, I wondered if he ever knew me at all.
explicacao: Citação de Diane Les Becquets sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “My heart didn’t break into a thousand pieces after he left. Instead, I realized all the things he…” articula amor, heartbreak, letting-go em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como letting-go e love.

texto: And in that moment with the warmth of the sun and coolness of the rock and the mountains and cedar all around her, she knew she would be okay with whatever happened to her. And with that thought, never before had she felt so free.
